name: lamina
description: Product design skill for developers who build with AI coding agents
author: Aryan Iyappan

scripts.test: node scripts/verify_lamina_bundle.mjs --check structure && node tests/check_lamina_init_test.mjs && node tests/check_lamina_personas_test.mjs && node tests/lamina_write_boundary_test.mjs && node tests/bench_clarify_test.mjs && node tests/bench_harness_hardening_test.mjs && node tests/harbor_sync_test.mjs && node tests/ingest_harbor_test.mjs && node tests/validate_run_yaml_test.mjs && node tests/coverage_insights_test.mjs && node tests/coverage_per_flow_test.mjs
scripts.test:eval:redteam: node evals/promptfoo/build-skill-context.mjs && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/promptfoo/lamina-redteam.yaml
scripts.fixtures:vendor: npm run fixtures:vendor:commerce && npm run fixtures:vendor:plane && npm run fixtures:vendor:outline
scripts.bench:score: node benchmarks/judges/golden-coverage.mjs && node benchmarks/scripts/score-judge.mjs && node benchmarks/judges/behavior-probes.mjs
scripts.bench:all: npm run bench:validate && npm run bench:run && npm run bench:score && npm run bench:analyze
